creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Oct 20 03:11:06 2013
New Revision: 330964
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330964

Log:
  A template language whose goal is reduce the syntax to the essential parts
  without becoming cryptic.
  
  WWW: http://slim-lang.com/
  
  PR:		ports/182655
  Submitted by:	Loic Blot <loic.blot@unix-experience.fr>

Added:
  head/devel/rubygem-slim/
  head/devel/rubygem-slim/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-slim/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-slim/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 02:48:58 2013	(r330963)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 03:11:06 2013	(r330964)
@@ -4214,6 +4214,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-shoulda-context
     SUBDIR += rubygem-shoulda-matchers
     SUBDIR += rubygem-simple_form
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-slim
     SUBDIR += rubygem-slop
     SUBDIR += rubygem-soap4r
     SUBDIR += rubygem-sprockets

Added: head/devel/rubygem-slim/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-slim/Makefile	Sun Oct 20 03:11:06 2013	(r330964)
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	slim
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.1
+CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	Template language whose goal is reduce the syntax to essential parts
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-tilt>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-tilt \
+		rubygem-temple>=0.6.6:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-temple
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+PLIST_FILES+=	bin/slimrb
+
+NO_STAGE=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/rubygem-slim/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-slim/distinfo	Sun Oct 20 03:11:06 2013	(r330964)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/slim-2.0.1.gem) = 188c5a062fda543077a5c310375d3a7c9be2fe7c228fcd62823b13c813d209ee
+SIZE (rubygem/slim-2.0.1.gem) = 66048

Added: head/devel/rubygem-slim/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-slim/pkg-descr	Sun Oct 20 03:11:06 2013	(r330964)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+A template language whose goal is reduce the syntax to the essential parts
+without becoming cryptic.
+
+WWW: http://slim-lang.com/
